title: Infrastructure Registry
description: Tracks all infrastructure resources across features, enabling scope classification (system vs feature-exclusive), contribution tracking, and promotion decisions. Managed by DEVOPS agent, consumed by QA and IMPLEMENT for regression/validation.

last_updated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last registry update

resources.description: All infrastructure resources managed across the project

type.description: Resource category. 'function' = serverless function (Lambda, Cloud Function, Azure Function)

handler.description: Entry point for serverless functions (e.g., 'src/handlers/auth.handler'). Required when type=function.

memory_mb.description: Function memory in MB (e.g., 128, 256, 512). Only for type=function.

timeout_seconds.description: Function timeout in seconds (e.g., 30, 60, 900). Only for type=function.

trigger.description: Event source that invokes this function. Only for type=function.

contract_slug.description: CONTRACT_SLUG from contracts/ directory this function implements. Links function to its OpenAPI contract. Only for type=function with trigger=api-gateway.

scope.description: feature = used by single feature only; system = shared across 2+ features

created_by.description: Feature ID that originally created this resource (e.g., 'USR-001')

data_bearing.description: true = stores persistent data (requires backup, encryption, deletion protection)

iac_module.description: Relative path to the IaC module/config (e.g., 'infra/features/USR-001/database.tf' or 'infra/modules/database/')

consumers.description: List of Feature IDs that use this resource. When length >= 2, scope should be 'system'

contributions.description: History of modifications to this resource by features

feature_id.description: Feature ID that made the contribution

description.description: What was changed (e.g., 'Added sessions table', 'Increased connection pool')

engine_override.description: Environment-specific engine (e.g., 'sqlite' for dev, 'PostgreSQL' for prod)

promoted_at.description: Date when resource was promoted from feature to system scope
